data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. POKE SALAD ANNIE recorded a 2 length win (22.80) in a Grade 6 last time at this track. Appeals as a leading chance in this. 8. RED TO BURN finds it hard to break through. Finished in the minors latest when third (17.94) at this track and may be close to breaking through. Solid record at the distance winning four races. Hard to beat again. 1. GUS LIMES has some solid form under his belt and proved too strong last time to win by 7 lengths at this track in a handy 17.44 beating One More Button. Winner at his latest appearance in the quickest time on the card. Expecting another bold showing. 5. MAJOR QUEEN is in form and worth thought again.","runners":[2,8,1,5],"exclusive":false}
